text:
mi          2008-05-16 22:09:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc/libwpd      Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Upgrade from 0.8.9 to 0.8.14. Based on
  
  PR:     ports/122548
  Submitted by:   Dima Panov
  
  While here switch to .bz2 master file, and to the easier SF-notation for
  MASTERSITES. GNU-make is not (any longer?) required and parallel build
  is now possible.
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.23      +4 -5      ports/textproc/libwpd/Makefile
  1.8       +3 -3      ports/textproc/libwpd/distinfo
  1.6       +1 -0      ports/textproc/libwpd/pkg-plist
